full_text:
Huang Wan (Ziyan) 黃琬 (子琰)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Wan (黃琬), styledZiyan (子琰), was born in Jiangxia. Sacked for opposing Dong Zhuo’s moving the capital, aided Wang Yun’s plot. Huang Wan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Huang Wan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
